[See Section. 8 (9 1
The average net annual profit in relation to a vehicle authorisid ' to
used under a permit in respect of noo.ti@d route shall be. alculated as
. , follows :- . _ '.. . .' I
1: The amount of profits bide dnriig a period of two years or ; during
the peiiod for which the permit (including any renewal thereof) was effective,
wEchevcr is less, shall be ascertained and the amount of losses sustained
during thc same period shall also be ascertained.
2. If there are no profits or if the amount of the profit does not exceed
the amount of the losses, the average net annual profits shall be taken to be
nil.
3. If the amount of the profits.exceeds the amount of the losses the
excess shall be the net profits.
4. From the net profits so found, the amount of profit for one year
shall be ascertaine4.b~ mathematical calcutation-and such, profit shall be
taken to be the average net annual profit. . ..
